forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 58. West wind around 6 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 79. Southwest wind 2 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the night whispers its secrets through Boston, the air carries a mild embrace, cooling gently to around 58 degrees. A soft west wind makes its presence known, stirring the leaves as the city rests. Within the quiet hours, clarity is held at bay, the world cloaked in the soothing veil of darkness, where city lights flicker like distant stars across the horizon.

As dawn approaches, expect the sun to emerge with a promise of warmth, inviting a day that rises to about 79 degrees. The sky will mostly wear a sunny demeanor, though whispers of showers and the possibility of thunderstorms linger on the horizon, beckoning the brave to venture out nonetheless. With a gentle southwest breeze that dances through the streets, it will be a day reminiscent of early summer, sweet with possibility. Dress in light layers, perfect for transitioning from the warmth of sunbeams to the occasional cool touch of raindrops. Perhaps take a leisurely stroll along the Charles, indulge in a cozy café with a good book in hand, or simply enjoy the vibrant energy of the city as it awakens from its slumber. The promise of scattered storms may add a slight thrill to your day, reminding us all that Boston's character is as unpredictable as the New England weather itself.
